admin show version

RP/0/RP0/CPU0:xrv9k#
show running-config
!Command: show running-config
!Time: Mon Mar 03 2024 03:03:03
Building configuration...
hostname xrv9k-router
!
enable password myenablepw
enable secret 5 $1$xyz$SECRET
!
username admin secret 5 $1$xyz$ADMIN
username operator password 0 plainpw
!
interface GigabitEthernet0/0/0/0
 ip address 192.168.1.1 255.255.255.0
!
snmp-server community rocommunity RO
snmp-server community rwcommunity RW
snmp-server host 192.168.1.100 rocommunity version 2c
!

!
end
